task_completion.description: Navigate to the system settings or quick settings to access the display/theme controls.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Android Settings app (specifically Display settings) or the pulled-down Quick Settings panel.

task_completion.description: Enable the system-wide Android Dark theme.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the 'Dark theme' or 'Dark mode' toggle switch being turned ON in the system settings or Quick Settings.

task_completion.description: Return the Flight Crew View app to the foreground.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The final screenshots show the Flight Crew View app open and actively occupying the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the Flight Crew View app is rendering with the dark theme active.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Flight Crew View app UI displays with dark-colored backgrounds (e.g., black or dark gray) instead of light colors.

task_completion.description: Verify a visual change from the initial light state to the final dark state.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Comparing early screenshots to final screenshots reveals the Flight Crew View app transitioning from a light color scheme to a dark color scheme.

integrity.description: The agent used the Android graphical user interface to enable the dark theme.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show taps and interactions with the Android Settings or Quick Settings UI, rather than a terminal or command-line interface.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Flight Crew View app.
integrity.visual_evidence: The app shown matches the layout and functionality of an aviation/flight crew app, not a generic text editor or image viewer.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass GUI navigation.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows, Termux, or ADB command prompts visible in the screenshots used to force the night mode setting.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target application is Flight Crew View (package: com.robert.fcView). The expected final state is that the Android system-wide night mode is enabled ('yes') and the Flight Crew View app is in the foreground displaying a dark theme. A successful run must show the system setting being changed via the GUI and the app reflecting this change visually with dark-colored backgrounds.
